Motion To Stay Discovery And Extend Time To Respond To Value Capital'S Discovery Requests Pending Resolution Of Demurrer
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs Guba, LLC, Thomas McInerney and Eric Lambrecht's Motion To Stay Discovery And Extend Time To Respond To Value Capital's Discovery Requests Pending Resolution Of Demurrer is denied. While future demurrers may be filed, the court does not find good cause to delay discovery for any additional time. Responses shall be served within 20 days of service of the amended Cross Complaint. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
